# function: op_header_operand_literal

An HTTP header operand that matches a literal value. Intended to be used with the `op_header_check` operation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::op_header_operand_literal("literal-value")
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
op_header_operand_literal(value string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `value` (String) The literal value to match.
